ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country or territory */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Official name of the country or territory */,
  "numeric_code" INTEGER /* Numeric code assigned by ISO 3166-1 */,
  "alpha_3_code" TEXT /* Alpha-3 code assigned by ISO 3166-1 */,
  "alpha_2_code" TEXT /* Alpha-2 code assigned by ISO 3166-1 */,
  "local_iso_code" TEXT /* Local ISO code assigned by ISO 3166-2 */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the record was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the information (e.g., ISO 3166/MA) */,
  "independent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the country is independent */,
  "calling_code" TEXT /* International calling code */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the country's flag */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's centroid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country or territory */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Official name of the country or territory in this version */,
  "numeric_code" INTEGER /* Numeric code assigned by ISO 3166-1 in this version */,
  "alpha_3_code" TEXT /* Alpha-3 code assigned by ISO 3166-1 in this version */,
  "alpha_2_code" TEXT /* Alpha-2 code assigned by ISO 3166-1 in this version */,
  "local_iso_code" TEXT /* Local ISO code assigned by ISO 3166-2 in this version */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the information in this version */,
  "independent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the country is independent in this version */,
  "calling_code" TEXT /* International calling code in this version */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the country in this version */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the country's flag in this version */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's centroid in this version */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's centroid in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_versions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country or territory */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country or territory */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used in the country or territory */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country or territory */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country or territory in square kilometers */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country or territory */,
  "government" TEXT /* Type of government in the country or territory */,
  "calling_code" TEXT /* International calling code */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the country's flag */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country's centroid */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the metadata was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_metadata_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subdivisions" (
  "subdivision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subdivision */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country or territory */,
  "subdivision_name" TEXT /* Name of the subdivision */,
  "subdivision_type" TEXT /* Type of the subdivision (e.g., province, state, region) */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the subdivision */,
  "independent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the subdivision is independent */,
  "calling_code" TEXT /* International calling code */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the subdivision */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the subdivision's flag */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the subdivision's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the subdivision's centroid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subdivision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subdivisions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subdivision_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "subdivision_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subdivision */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the subdivision */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the subdivision */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the subdivision in square kilometers */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the subdivision */,
  "calling_code" TEXT /* International calling code */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the subdivision */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the subdivision's flag */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the subdivision's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the subdivision's centroid */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the metadata was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subdivision_metadata_subdivision_id FOREIGN KEY ("subdivision_id") REFERENCES subdivisions ("subdivision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data steward, end-user) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country or territory being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the change */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_sources" (
  "country_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country-source link */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country or territory */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the country-source link was last updated */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the source for the specific country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_sources_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
